nodes.label: NeuroForge Vision & Core Principles
nodes.rationale: Desktop-first (no web tech: React/Electron/Next.js). Visual-first: graph editor is the center, no code needed for common tasks. PyTorch native: only backend. Unreal Blueprint / Blender Geometry Nodes / LabVIEW as inspiration. Long-term goal: complete ML environment without leaving the app.

hyperedges.label: C++ Performance Modules (storage + metrics via pybind11)
Phase 0 Toolchain Setup (Python + C++ + tests + linting)
Immutable Object Hierarchy in Content-Addressable Store
Training IPC Pipeline (Worker → Queue → Controller → UI)
